testcase.name: test_login_with_valid_credentials

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should contain token assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTc3MTUwNDA4NywiaWF0IjoxNzcxNDE3Njg3fQ.5jRTIzdeYhf8OenpXeTy-neO8e3s9Z4TkOllg7BC6LU', 'expires_in': 86400, 'token_type': 'bearer'}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shop_api.py:93: in test_login_with_valid_credentials assert "token" in data, "Response should contain token" E AssertionError: Response should contain token E assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTc3MTUwNDA4NywiaWF0IjoxNzcxNDE3Njg3fQ.5jRTIzdeYhf8OenpXeTy-neO8e3s9Z4TkOllg7BC6LU', 'expires_in': 86400, 'token_type': 'bearer'}

testcase.name: test_verify_token

failure.message: AssertionError: Token verification failed with 401 assert 401 == 200 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shop_api.py:109: in test_verify_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Token verification failed with {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Token verification failed with 401 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_order_with_specific_time
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shop_api.py:174: in test_create_order_with_specific_time assert response.status_code == 200, f"Order creation failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Order creation failed: {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","items",0,"options",0,"price"],"msg":"Input should be a valid string","input":1.5,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/string_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_all_orders
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shop_api.py:187: in test_get_all_orders assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get orders: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get orders: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_confirm_asap_order_with_prep_time
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shop_api.py:226: in test_confirm_asap_order_with_prep_time assert confirm_response.status_code == 200, f"Confirm failed: {confirm_response.text}" E AssertionError: Confirm failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cancel_order
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shop_api.py:260: in test_cancel_order assert cancel_response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_all_reservations
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shop_api.py:296: in test_get_all_reservations assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get reservations: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get reservations: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_confirm_reservation
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shop_api.py:325: in test_confirm_reservation assert confirm_response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_reject_reservation
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shop_api.py:350: in test_reject_reservation assert reject_response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_settings
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shop_api.py:387: in test_update_settings assert response.status_code == 200, f"Settings update failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Settings update failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
